Name: Sprouting Memories
NotPassedDesc: Morning light illuminates the city.\nHuhu loves lingering in these streets and alleys, keeping company with the bustling crowds as they hurry toward their dreams.
PassedDesc: The first flower is for the loved one.\nTo make up for the words left unspoken, and to complete the final chapter known as farewell.

Name: Budding Whispers
NotPassedDesc: The days roll by.\nPeople drift past with tears in their eyes, and Huhu never learns why.
PassedDesc: The second flower is for the one and only you.\nYou love life and hold it in reverence. This world is full of wonders, and your journey through it was never in vain.

Name: Dewy Garden
NotPassedDesc: The light is faint and soft.\nThe flowers people have left behind quietly fill every corner of the streets.
PassedDesc: The third flower is for this city.\nBeneath a thousand glowing windows, there is always a light that keeps someone warm. Life may be ordinary, yet it holds the quietest beauty.

Name: Distant Offerings
NotPassedDesc: The sun rises as always.\nLife may be small as a speck of dust, yet it still shines brilliantly in this world.
PassedDesc: The final flower is for the future we long for.\nIt sees disaster, and still sees hope. It sees ruins, and still sees a faint light.
